title: Chinese Food
description: There's a lot of Chinese food.
body:
## Chinese Foods - CF

### Overview

**This is a remake of [Chinese Foods](https://modrinth.com/mod/chinesefoods).**

This mod adds food from all over China to Minecraft.

Chinese Foods, or CF for short, adds different classic Chinese foods to our beloved game, Minecraft.

This mod only has English(US) and 简体中文（中国大陆） translation.

If you want to eat Chinese food in Minecraft, please download this mod.

### As of now (February 6th, 2025) the mod has:

#### Foods:

- Douzhir

- Fired Ring

- Flower Cake

- Baozi

- Lamb Paomo

#### Crops:

- Mung Beans
